Class StudentStat

java.lang.Object
statistics.StudentStat
public class StudentStat extends Object

Title: StudentStat Class

Description: An immutable record of the participation statistics computed for a single student by the Aggregate Statistics Engine (TP3 Aspect #4). It carries the three tallies the engine produces — posts authored, replies authored, and the count of distinct other students whose questions the student has answered — together with the compliance verdict derived from the last of these.

The distinct-students-answered count is the field that drives grading: the course requires each student to have answered questions from at least three different students. The other two tallies are reported for context on the grading dashboard (Aspect #2) but do not affect the verdict.

Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025

Version:
1.00 2026-07-14 Initial prototype for HW3 Task 5
Author:
Weiye (Richard) Zhang

  • Constructor Details

    • StudentStat

      public StudentStat(String student, int postsAuthored, int repliesAuthored, int distinctStudentsAnswered, boolean meetsRequirement)

      Method: StudentStat

      Description: Constructs an immutable statistics record. The verdict is passed in rather than derived here, because the threshold that defines it belongs to the engine (ParticipationStats), not to this data holder. Keeping the rule in one place is what lets the instructor change the threshold without editing this class.

      Parameters:
      student - specifies the student's canonical username
      postsAuthored - specifies the number of posts the student authored
      repliesAuthored - specifies the number of replies the student authored
      distinctStudentsAnswered - specifies the number of distinct other students answered
      meetsRequirement - specifies the compliance verdict for this student

  • Method Details

    • getStudent

      public String getStudent()
      Returns:
      the student's canonical username

    • getPostsAuthored

      public int getPostsAuthored()
      Returns:
      the number of posts the student authored

    • getRepliesAuthored

      public int getRepliesAuthored()
      Returns:
      the number of replies the student authored

    • getDistinctStudentsAnswered

      public int getDistinctStudentsAnswered()
      Returns:
      the number of distinct other students the student answered (the graded metric)

    • meetsRequirement

      public boolean meetsRequirement()
      Returns:
      true iff the student met the distinct-students requirement

    • toString

      public String toString()

      Method: toString

      Description: Renders the record as one human-readable line for console output and for the plain-text portion of the grading export (Aspect #8).

      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a single-line summary of this student's statistics and verdict
